resibo.verdict: No specific claim provided for verification.

literacyLesson.summary: Naku, mhie, walang specific claim kaya mahirap i-fact check. Dapat mas malinaw para mabusisi natin!

points.issue: Sis, walang specific na statement na pwedeng i-verify dito. Paano natin malalaman kung true or false?
points.correction: Dapat may konkretong claim, like "Si ganito ay nag-resign" para masigurado natin sa credible sources.

points.issue: Walang ebidensya na nakalakip, puro "test" lang.
points.correction: Dapat may supporting evidence like news articles or official statements para mas kapanipaniwala.

points.issue: Teh, walang credible sources na available para suportahan ito.
points.correction: Maghanap tayo ng verified news organizations or government websites para makasigurado.

literacyLesson.tip: Before believing anything, siguraduhin na may specific claim, ebidensya, at galing sa mapagkakatiwalaang sources, okay?
